arts.ttl: Luis Enrique says PSG 'can still be out' of UCL
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain boss Luis Enrique praised his side after their 3-0 win at RB Salzburg in the Champions League on Tuesday, but said they must improve if they want to stay in the competition.

However, Sir Jim Ratcliffe is in no rush to make a decision following the unexpected departure of Dan Ashworth. As a result, it might explain the latest news on replacing Ashworth. arts.sum: With Ruben Amorim now in charge, Marcus Rashford’s future at Manchester United could begin to take shape during the 2024-25 season. Despite the managerial change, transfer rumors continue to circulate. In October, TEAMtalk reported that Paris Saint-Germain have rekindled their interest in Rashford. arts.ttl: Video: Désiré Doué Scores Impressive First PSG Goal Against Salzburg
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain needed a win over RB Salzburg to stay in contention for a spot in the next round of the UEFA Champions League. Gonçalo Ramos gave them the lead, and the Ligue 1 side added two more goals in the second half, including one from Désiré Doué. arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | RB Salzburg 0-3 PSG: Dominance in possession leads to victory as Les Parisiens end stuttering European run
arts.sum: UEFA Champions League, Matchday 6, 10/12/2024 After a four-match winless run in Europe, Paris Saint-Germain finally turned the domination of possession into victory with a 3-0 win against RB Salzburg…

arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain struggled to find the back of the net early on in the matchup against RB Salzburg, but the Ligue 1 finally broke through midway through the first half thanks to a goal from Gonçalo Ramos in the 30th minute after tapping it in at the far post.
